# Receipt Photos Fixture

50 photographed sample receipts for OCR testing.

## Categories

- Grocery (20)
- Restaurant (10)
- Gas station (10)
- Online/digital (10)

## Quality Mix

- 35 clear, well-lit photos
- 10 challenging (crumpled, faded, angled)
- 5 edge cases (multiple receipts, partial, foreign currency)

- [ ] TODO: Photograph and organize 50 receipts (Phase 4 prerequisite)
